name: Gods Wars : infinity Epic
short_description: Come and defeat the evil gods! Create your personal outfit, overcome the siege of numerous monsters and leaders, and usher in a new victory! Gods Wars is a pixel ARPG Rogue like Game. You can obtain epic artifacts, upgrade epic skills, choose your epic pet, face the powerful evil gods!
detailed_description:
contact

More information on discord :


About the Game

Gods Wars : "Gods Wars: Infinity Epic" is a gorgeous action roguelike game that offers a fresh take on the genre. Featuring multiple characters, numerous bosses, and various New Game+ , it includes 9 playable characters and 6 worlds. Here, you'll have access to a wide range of equipment and face off against various types of monsters and bosses. Join in and create your unique play style!

DISCORD：

The Game’s Various Versions
【Gods Wars-Fallen Angel】
【Gods Wars Side Story-Sin and Punishment】
【Gods Wars Ⅱ-Reborn】
【Gods Wars Ⅲ】
【Gods Wars Ex-Vampire】
【Gods Wars Ⅳ-Rise of War-God】

Exciting Combat, Infinite Possibilities
The game features multiple characters, numerous bosses, and a wealth of content. It features 9 playable characters, each with unique professions and attributes, allowing players to craft diverse builds and play styles.
The game includes 6 worlds, where players can challenge a variety of monsters and bosses and collect diverse equipment. You can expect over About 50 hours of gameplay!



Freedom to Customize, Different variations
Switch between 9 different weapon types—bows, shields, swords, magic wands, daggers, staffs, claws, maces, and axes—freely.
With over 600 pieces of equipment, you can create a combat style that uniquely yours.
You’ll also have over 200 pets to fight with you, each with distinct attributes, and more than 180 artifacts to discover!



Tips:
At the respawn point, choose your profession, artifact, and deity.
Complete the NPC task in the first level as soon as possible and unlock the merchants in the Divine Kingdom.
Before starting the level, talk to the blacksmith and craft a handy weapon.
Take a stroll around the city to acquire some initial items and pets.

Supports mouse, keyboard, and controller.

*languages with full audio support
